hero.description: Horizon Tech d.o.o. kkampuni ya tekinologiya ey'ensi yonna erina ekitebe ekikulu mu Sarajevo, ewa ebikozesebwa eby'omulembe eri amakampuni mu ssemazinga asatu.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Tuyamba ebitongole okukyusa ebirowoozo eby'amaanyi mu bintu ebyesigika ebya digito ebireeta omuwendo gw'obusuubuzi.
points: Align technology delivery with clear business results.
Okuzimba enteekateeka ez'ekiseera ekiwanvu ezisigala nga zikuumibwa ng'ebibinja byeyongera.
Okukolagana obulungi n'abavunaanyizibwa okuva ku nkola okutuuka mu kukola.

expertise.title: Obukugu
expertise.description: Our multidisciplinary teams combine engineering depth with product thinking across modern technology stacks.
points: Cloud architecture, DevOps automation, and resilient infrastructure.
Applied AI/ML, data workflows, and IoT-enabled products.

approach.title: Enkola
approach.description: We execute with a transparent, iterative model that keeps delivery predictable while reducing product risk.
points: Discover: define scope, priorities, and success metrics early.
Build: ship in focused increments with continuous feedback loops.
Optimize: Monitor results and improve performance over time.

cta.title: Weetegefu okukyusa bizinensi yo?
cta.description: Join the growing list of companies that trust Horizon Tech to deliver innovative solutions and exceptional results.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.description: Olina pulojekiti mu birowoozo? Twandyagadde okuwulira okuva gy'oli. Tubuulire engeri gye tuyinza okukuyamba okutuukiriza ebirowoozo byo mu bulamu bwo.

hamza.bio: Visionary leader and technical architect with 10+ years in enterprise software, specializing in AI/ML, cloud platforms, and scalable product architecture.

ahmet.bio: Cybersecurity specialist focused on enterprise security architecture, secure on-prem infrastructure, and compliance-first delivery for regulated environment.

culture.title: Obulamu ku Horizon Tech
culture.description: Tukulaakulanya obuwangwa bw'okuvumbula, okukolagana, n'okuyiga okw'enjawulo

remoteFirst.title: Obuwangwa bwa Remote-First
remoteFirst.description: Work from anywhere with flexible hours and a focus on results, not location.

collaborative.title: Obutonde bw'ensi

workLife.title: Work-Life Balance
workLife.description: Okuwummula, okubudaabuda abalwadde b'ebirowoozo, n'okussa ekitiibwa mu biseera by'omuntu.

innovation.title: Innovation Time
innovation.description: Obudde bwa 20% ku pulojekiti z'omuntu, hackathons, n'okunoonyereza ku tekinologiya omupya.

hero.description: Join a team of engineers building cutting-edge software for global clients. Kola emirimu egy'ewala, okukulaakulana, n'okukola enkyukakyuka ennungi.

process.title: Our Hiring Process
process.description: Mu ngeri y'emu, obeera n'obuvunaanyizibwa obw'enjawulo era ng'okozesa obudde bwo.

faqs.question: Mpeereza ki Horizon Tech gy'ewa?
faqs.answer: Tuwa enkola y'okukulaakulanya software, AI/ML solutions, cloud architecture, DevOps, business intelligence, and IoT services.

faqs.question: Nnyinza ntya okutandika pulojekiti ne Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Tuwuliziganya naffe ng'oyita mu ffoomu oba e-mail ng'onnyonnyola ebyetaago byo. Tujja kukola enteekateeka y'okunoonyereza era tugenda kukola ekirowoozo eky'enjawulo.

faqs.question: Buli kiseera obeera n'obuyambi n'obuyambi obw'enjawulo?
faqs.answer: Yee. Tuwaayo obuyambi n'okuddaabiriza ebikozesebwa omuli okutereeza obuzibu, okulongoosa ebyokwerinda, n'okulongoosa ebifaananyi.
